## Summary

## Scope
- [ ] Tasks feature
- [ ] Auth/login
- [ ] UI system
- [ ] Database/migrations
- [ ] CI/testing

## Release Checklist
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` run or explicitly deferred
- [ ] No new raw typography/color utility violations
- [ ] Server actions handled errors and return user-safe messages
- [ ] Migration (if any) is backwards-safe and documented
- [ ] Manual QA completed for changed flows

## Definition Of Done
- [ ] Feature behavior matches acceptance criteria
- [ ] Accessibility pass (keyboard/focus/labels/touch targets)
- [ ] Error/empty/loading states verified
- [ ] Observability added for new failure paths
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior/process changed)
